message:
feat(fp-frame): add DataFrame.value_counts_map per-column series (frankenpandas-1qof)

Adds `value_counts_map()` which returns `BTreeMap<String, Series>`
— one `Series.value_counts()` result per column, mirroring the
pandas idiom `{col: df[col].value_counts() for col in df.columns}`.

This is distinct from the two existing methods:
- `value_counts()` counts unique full-row tuples.
- `value_counts_per_column()` returns a single-column nunique
  summary DataFrame.

The new method picked the `_map` suffix to avoid colliding with
the existing `value_counts_per_column()` nunique summary.

Two tests verify the per-column decomposition and show that its
shape differs from the row-level value_counts().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
